sentences.english: My favorite snack is chocolate chip cookies.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 간식은 초콜릿 칩 쿠키예요.

sentences.english: My mom bakes them every Sunday.
The whole house smells amazing when they're in the oven.
sentences.korean: 오븐에 있을 때 온 집 안에 좋은 냄새가 나요.

sentences.english: I always eat them with a cold glass of milk.
sentences.korean: 항상 차가운 우유 한 잔과 같이 먹어요.

sentences.english: I can never eat just one.
sentences.korean: 하나만 먹는 건 절대 못 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
